hooks.hook_text: POV: you just walked down the ACTUAL grand staircase from Titanic's sister ship
hooks.visual_opener: Person's hand trailing down ornate wooden banister, camera following
hooks.psychological_trigger: Physical connection to history - you're touching what they touched

hooks.hook_text: POV: you're standing where 1,500 people took their last breath
hooks.visual_opener: Dark ocean floor recreation, artifacts scattered in dim lighting

hooks.hook_text: POV: you just held a 112-year-old love letter that never made it home
hooks.visual_opener: Hands holding aged letter through glass case, camera zooming on handwriting

hooks.hook_text: They said this exhibition would make grown adults cry... wait for it
hooks.visual_opener: Person walking confidently into exhibition entrance
hooks.psychological_trigger: Challenge to emotional strength - proving skeptics wrong

hooks.hook_text: Walking through 300 real Titanic artifacts... wait for the moment I see THAT one
hooks.visual_opener: Quick montage of various artifacts in cases
hooks.psychological_trigger: Anticipation and curiosity - what's the special artifact?

hooks.hook_text: The temperature drops to 28°F in this room for a reason... wait for it
hooks.visual_opener: Person entering room, breath visible, rubbing arms

hooks.hook_text: Her face when she realized this china plate survived but 1,500 people didn't
hooks.visual_opener: Close-up of woman's face changing from wonder to somber realization
hooks.psychological_trigger: Emotional whiplash - beauty and tragedy colliding

hooks.hook_text: Dad's reaction when he saw the boarding pass with his daughter's name on it
hooks.visual_opener: Man pointing at display case, daughter looking shocked beside him
hooks.psychological_trigger: Personal connection - what if that was me?

hooks.hook_text: Watch this 8-year-old's face when she learns not everyone made it off the ship
hooks.visual_opener: Child's expression changing from excitement to understanding
hooks.psychological_trigger: Innocence meeting reality - universal human experience

hooks.hook_text: Can you walk through the memorial room without getting goosebumps?
hooks.visual_opener: Dimly lit memorial space with names on walls

hooks.hook_text: Can you guess which passenger's story will break you? (It's not who you think)
hooks.visual_opener: Multiple passenger story displays, camera panning between them

hooks.hook_text: Can you make it through without buying something from the gift shop? Impossible.
hooks.visual_opener: Person confidently walking past gift shop, then cut to them with full bag
hooks.psychological_trigger: Relatability and humor breaking emotional tension

hooks.hook_text: This closes in 3 weeks and you STILL haven't seen the piece of the actual ship
hooks.visual_opener: Massive ship fragment with dramatic lighting, countdown timer overlay
hooks.psychological_trigger: Urgency and regret - missing once-in-a-lifetime opportunity

hooks.hook_text: Everyone's posting about this exhibition except you... what are you waiting for?
hooks.visual_opener: Split screen of social media posts vs empty exhibition ticket booth

hooks.hook_text: Your friends will ask if you saw it. Your answer will be embarrassing.
hooks.visual_opener: Group of friends animatedly discussing, one person looking left out
hooks.psychological_trigger: Social embarrassment and missing cultural moment
